## Summary

- What is changing?
- Why is this change needed?

## Change Type

- [ ] Feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Fix (`fix`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor`)
- [ ] Tests (`test`)
- [ ] Docs (`docs`)
- [ ] Tooling/Chore (`chore`)

## Scope

- [ ] API
- [ ] Models
- [ ] Migrations
- [ ] Connectors
- [ ] Signal rules
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Docs

## Validation

List exactly what you ran.

- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files`
- [ ] Relevant tests executed
- [ ] Manual endpoint checks (if API change)

Commands and results:

- Command:
- Result:

## Migration Impact

- [ ] No schema change
- [ ] Django migration added/updated
- [ ] SQL bootstrap migration added/updated
- [ ] Migration docs updated (`database/migrations/README.md`)

Notes:

## Risk and Rollback

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Primary risk:
- Rollback plan:

## Documentation

- [ ] Not needed
- [ ] Updated README/overview/docs

Updated files:

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow `type(scope): summary`
- [ ] Change is focused and small enough to review
- [ ] No temporary files or debug leftovers
- [ ] No unrelated files included
